text_snippet: Upon the commencement of this Constitution, the Constitution Assembly, having discharged its responsibility of framing a Constitution for the Republic, shall stand dissolved.

article_id: 111. Binding effect of Supreme Court judgments

article_id: 112. Action in aid of Supreme Court
